name: com.lvn.engine.shell
description: The ready-made novel application over the Elvin engine: boot → title browse (carousel or hub/collections) → chapter play, plus every product screen — store, wardrobe, skin/pack shops, CG gallery, profile, leaderboards, daily rewards, settings, popups, auth, chapter-energy HUD. Drop NovelApp on a UIDocument and point it at a content server. Games embedding the engine with their own UI skip this package entirely — the core plays stories without it.
